text: - 2.15.2 COMPOSITE CLEANUP CREW: Contractor will organize composite clean up weekly during construction. Subcontractors with crews of 5 or less shall not provide composite cleanup crew labor unless daily cleanup is not performed to the Contractor's satisfaction. Subcontractors with crew(s) between 6 and 19 men shall contribute one (1) man for one (1), ten-hour day of composite cleanup. Subcontractors with crew(s) of 20 men and over shall contribute two (2) men for one (1) ten-hour day for composite cleanup. This excludes subcontractors with crews on site for less than 4 hours per day. Composite cleanup day shall be determined and managed solely by the Contractor.
